text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser gets injured during training,
so I rush her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
This is the kind of injury that puts a hold on
training for a while, huh? Mumuuun...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
...You know, I can deal with a little pain, so do
you think it'd be okay if I train anyway?
choice_data_list:
Let's stop now to ensure you can still run in the
future.
Why don't we see what you can handle?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... You're right... It'd be dangerous to push myself...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
All I can do right now is heal up quick... I'll take
things easy today...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser sounds disappointed, but
returns to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Okay! Let's head back to the track right away and
see if there isn't some exercise I can still do!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Gyah... It's no use... It starts hurting the moment I
put pressure on it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: I guess all I can do right now is rest... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser slowly returns to the dorm
looking pained.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Phew! I think I'll be fine as long as I don't break
into an all-out sprint!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I should be able to train like this until I'm fully
healed! Oh, thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser stays mindful of her injury
and trains comfortably within her limits.
